name: Zevotek, Inc.
summary: Zevotek, Inc., a development stage company, focuses on developing, manufacturing, marketing, selling, and distributing plumbing valves that reduce water use in the home. The company intends to offer Gung H2O, a patented plumbing valve that is installed in the traditional gravity toilet tank of a non-low flow toilet to regulate the amount of water used to fill and flush a toilet. It also develops an ionic bulb utilizing light emitting diodes for use as an air-purifying product. Zevotek, Inc. plans to markets its products through its Website newionicbulb.com, TV infomercials, and consumer catalog, as well as through sales agencies to retail and specialty stores, and distributors. The company was formerly known as Diet Coffee, Inc. and changed its name to Zevotek, Inc. in June 2008. Zevotek, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is based in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey.
